title: El triángulo rosa y la cura nazi para la homosexualidad
original_title: El Triángulo Rosa y la cura Nazi para la Homosexualidad
overview: A documentary about the alleged Nazi cure homosexuality conducted by a Danish doctor who experimented with a young homosexual in the concentration camp. After the war, he took refuge in Argentina until his death in 1965.
